text: Publications about Traumatic Events Helping Children and Adolescents Cope With Traumatic Events This fact sheet presents information on how children and adolescents respond to traumatic events, and what family, friends, and trusted adults can do to help. En español Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder Information about post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD) including what it is, who develops PTSD, symptoms, treatment options, and how to find help. En español
